title: aleuritopteris rosulata
intro: Aleuritopteris rosulata, also known as the "Chinese bristle fern", is a type of plant that belongs to the family Osmundaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Aleuritopteris rosulata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by boiling or decocting its rhizomes and leaves to create a tea or infusion for medicinal use.
